entries.content: For CI dashboards, derive status via event-to-state fold before lane bucketing. Use stable source identity (`workflow_id ?? name` + branch) plus timestamp recency; never use run id for supersession because reruns/new pushes have different semantics. Pick representative source by overall state so attention cards show the failing current check, not merely newest green check.

For dashboard refactors that intentionally change lane keys, updating model/server/UI tests in sequence kept the blast radius controlled: first prove pure reducer semantics, then server API shape, then static UI contracts, then targeted/full bin verification.
